sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lia le tang mu bang kingai, thei bang kilo,
Kum sawt tang bang dam khawm uh hen;
gualte’n pak bang tawi, nunnop i zo,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sihna’n samgi bang khen mateng, ma tengin,
Itna le tongciamna’n khau bang hual khawm in,
Gual lai-ah ni bang tang uh

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Inn le lo suang zo dingin, Na siam inla,
le leeng do siam innkuan suak sak inla,
Vandai ngo tawh Na tuam den in.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: minthang le sung nek, mim le tang tawh,
Nunnop lii bang Na cingsak in;

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Van Lau Kha Siangtho va bang
Thangvan tuang tun dong Na huai in.
